properties.name: jwt.secret-key
properties.description: A description for 'jwt.secret-key'

properties.name: jwt.access-token-expiration
properties.description: A description for 'jwt.access-token-expiration'

properties.name: jwt.refresh-token-expiration
properties.description: A description for 'jwt.refresh-token-expiration'

properties.name: identity.location-seed.enabled
properties.description: A description for 'identity.location-seed.enabled'

properties.name: identity.location-seed.api-url
properties.description: A description for 'identity.location-seed.api-url'

properties.name: identity.refresh-token-cleanup.enabled
properties.description: Enable scheduled cleanup for revoked and expired refresh tokens.

properties.name: identity.refresh-token-cleanup.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for scheduled cleanup of revoked and expired refresh tokens.

properties.name: cloudinary.cloud-name
properties.description: Cloudinary cloud name used for media uploads and delivery.

properties.name: cloudinary.api-key
properties.description: Cloudinary API key used to sign upload and destroy requests.

properties.name: cloudinary.api-secret
properties.description: Cloudinary API secret used only on the backend.

properties.name: cloudinary.secure
properties.description: Use HTTPS for Cloudinary upload and delivery URLs.

properties.name: cloudinary.base-folder
properties.description: Base folder prefix for all media stored in Cloudinary.

properties.name: cloudinary.cleanup.enabled
properties.description: Enable scheduled cleanup of stale or pending-delete media assets.

properties.name: cloudinary.cleanup.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for Cloudinary media cleanup.

properties.name: cloudinary.cleanup.stale-pending-hours
properties.description: How long a pending media upload intent can live before cleanup marks it for deletion.

properties.name: cloudinary.cleanup.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of media assets processed in a single cleanup batch.

properties.name: cloudinary.cleanup.max-delete-attempts
properties.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for deleting a Cloudinary asset.

properties.name: cloudinary.upload.avatar-max-bytes
properties.description: Maximum allowed avatar upload size in bytes.

properties.name: cloudinary.upload.image-max-bytes
properties.description: Maximum allowed image upload size in bytes for non-avatar usages.

properties.name: cloudinary.upload.video-max-bytes
properties.description: Maximum allowed video upload size in bytes.
